verses.text: 'I will extol thee, my God, O king,' David says, blessing God every day, for 'great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised,' His greatness unsearchable. Praise is his daily resolve. The infinite greatness of God calls for endless adoration.

'I will extol thee, my God, O king,' David says, blessing God every day, for 'great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised,' His greatness unsearchable. Praise is his daily resolve. The infinite greatness of God calls for endless adoration.

'I will extol thee, my God, O king,' David says, blessing God every day, for 'great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised,' His greatness unsearchable. Praise is his daily resolve. The infinite greatness of God calls for endless adoration.
'One generation shall praise thy works to another,' telling His mighty acts and abundant goodness. Praise is handed down. Each age is to teach the next the wonders and kindness of God.
'One generation shall praise thy works to another,' telling His mighty acts and abundant goodness. Praise is handed down. Each age is to teach the next the wonders and kindness of God.
'One generation shall praise thy works to another,' telling His mighty acts and abundant goodness. Praise is handed down. Each age is to teach the next the wonders and kindness of God.
'One generation shall praise thy works to another,' telling His mighty acts and abundant goodness. Praise is handed down. Each age is to teach the next the wonders and kindness of God.

'The LORD is gracious, and full of compassion; slow to anger, and of great mercy,' good to all, His tender mercies over all His works. His goodness is universal. No creature is outside the reach of His kindness.

'The LORD is gracious, and full of compassion; slow to anger, and of great mercy,' good to all, His tender mercies over all His works. His goodness is universal. No creature is outside the reach of His kindness.
All His works and saints bless Him, telling of His glorious kingdom, for 'thy kingdom is an everlasting kingdom.' His reign never ends. The dominion of God endures through all generations.

All His works and saints bless Him, telling of His glorious kingdom, for 'thy kingdom is an everlasting kingdom.' His reign never ends. The dominion of God endures through all generations.

'The LORD upholdeth all that fall' and raises the bowed; He opens His hand and 'satisfiest the desire of every living thing.' He sustains and feeds all. The God of the universe stoops to lift the fallen and feed the hungry.

'The LORD upholdeth all that fall' and raises the bowed; He opens His hand and 'satisfiest the desire of every living thing.' He sustains and feeds all. The God of the universe stoops to lift the fallen and feed the hungry.

'The LORD upholdeth all that fall' and raises the bowed; He opens His hand and 'satisfiest the desire of every living thing.' He sustains and feeds all. The God of the universe stoops to lift the fallen and feed the hungry.

The LORD is righteous and holy in all His ways, 'nigh unto all them that call upon him in truth,' fulfilling the desire of those who fear Him. He hears sincere prayer. The God of all is near to every heart that calls on Him truly.

The LORD is righteous and holy in all His ways, 'nigh unto all them that call upon him in truth,' fulfilling the desire of those who fear Him. He hears sincere prayer. The God of all is near to every heart that calls on Him truly.

The LORD is righteous and holy in all His ways, 'nigh unto all them that call upon him in truth,' fulfilling the desire of those who fear Him. He hears sincere prayer. The God of all is near to every heart that calls on Him truly.

He preserves all who love Him but destroys the wicked; so David resolves his mouth shall speak God's praise for ever. Praise and preservation go together. The God who keeps His own is to be praised by every creature for ever.
